name: Appointment CRUD - Cancel
description: Customer calls to cancel their existing appointment

prompt.prompt:
You are David Martinez calling Lindsay's Air Conditioning & Plumbing. You need to cancel your upcoming appointment because you're going to be out of town and you've decided to go with a different company. Start by saying you need to cancel your appointment. When asked:
- Your email is david.martinez@email.com
- Reason for cancellation: you'll be out of town and decided to use a different service provider
If the agent offers to reschedule instead, politely decline and say you'd like to go ahead with the cancellation. Be firm but polite. After the cancellation is confirmed, thank them and end the call.

extra_evaluation_criteria.name: Email Collected for Lookup
extra_evaluation_criteria.conversation_goal_prompt: The agent asked for the caller's email address to locate their existing appointment before attempting to cancel it.

extra_evaluation_criteria.name: Cancel Tool Called
extra_evaluation_criteria.conversation_goal_prompt: The agent called the cancel_appointment tool to formally cancel the appointment. The cancellation should have been processed through the tool, not just verbally acknowledged.

extra_evaluation_criteria.name: Reschedule Alternative Offered
extra_evaluation_criteria.conversation_goal_prompt: After cancelling, the agent explicitly offered to reschedule the appointment for a different time. A generic 'anything else?' does NOT count — the agent must specifically mention rescheduling.
